body:
Title: CRA Form T5004 2025 Claim for Tax Shelter Loss or Deduction.

Source:
- https://www.canada.ca/content/dam/cra-arc/formspubs/pbg/t5004/t5004-25e.pdf

CRA T5004 2025 is used by an investor claiming a loss or deduction, a donation or political contribution deduction, or a tax credit for an interest in a tax shelter. Line 67650 is the total amount claimed. The notes say to enter the total amount claimed on the last form only if more room is needed. The notes say if the claim is for a gift, use line 34900; if the claim is for a political contribution, use line 40900; and if the taxpayer is a limited partner of a partnership that invested in a tax shelter, use line 12200. The form examples also name line 12600 for rental income, line 21700 for business investment loss, line 13500 for business income, line 22100 for carrying charges and interest expenses, line 14100 for farming income, line 22400 for exploration and development expenses, line 14300 for fishing income, and line 23200 for other deductions.
